---
name: Bug report
description: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the bug

A clear, short description of what went wrong.

## To reproduce

1. Run `...`
2. Do `...`
3. See error / wrong behavior

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Environment

- OS: (e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04)
- Python version: (`python --version`)
- autopsy-cli version: (`autopsy --version` or `pip show autopsy-cli`)

## Config (optional)

Relevant parts of `~/.autopsy/config.yaml` or flags used. **Remove any secrets (API keys, tokens).**

## Additional context

Logs, screenshots, or other details that help.
